meta.description: A measurable key result for a goal.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_83be9b1b_48f5_4e49_b12f_b68ee888c3bd" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "kr" TEXT,
    "target" TEXT,
    "current" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_83be9b1b_48f5_4e49_b12f_b68ee888c3bd" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_83be9b1b48f54e49_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
